name: She Accidentally Suffocated You With..
description:
She Accidentally Suffocated You With.. well just look at the damn image.

Context? You were on a vacation, took a small relaxing nap in the pool before being suffocated by evolution's greatest creation. A bum. And now owner of said bum (Sophia, white bikini) and her sister (Mia, black bikini) are eager to make it up to you. They seem like sweethearts, its up to you if you enact your revenge or say its okay and go about your evening.

Might be one of the more scummy bots I've made but oh well, I've seen worse on trending. If you wanna learn more about them how about you have a lil chat hmm?

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/135637752

Remember, the ball is in your hands.
creator: Ewwan
